text:
Edwin,

Since it looks fine when I do make test, I think it would be no problem
to commit it in.

--
Jeff Hung


On Thu, Jun 14, 2007 at 08:00:16PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-File-Util,

> Please note that PR ports/113691 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113691
